case_name: Hussainara Khatoon vs Home Secretary, State of Bihar
summary: Historic judgment on rights of undertrial prisoners
key_holding: Prolonged detention of undertrials is a violation of Article 21 of the Constitution. Detention must have nexus with the offence and sentence.
impact: Landmark - changed entire bail jurisprudence in India
full_text: The right to liberty is fundamental. Detention beyond necessity is unconstitutional. Bail is the rule.
